prophecies.q: 《高堡奇人》探讨了历史的偶然性与平行现实
prophecies.a: 菲利普·K·迪克描述了轴心国赢得二战后的平行世界。小说中的人物通过《易经》占卜来探索「真实」世界的可能性，质疑了历史的必然性。
prophecies.q_en: The Man in the High Castle explored historical contingency and parallel realities
prophecies.a_en: Philip K. Dick described a parallel world where the Axis powers won WWII. Characters use the I Ching to explore possible 'real' worlds, questioning historical inevitability.
prophecies.yearReason: 小说未设定具体预言时间
prophecies.yearReason_en: No specific prediction date in the novel

prophecies.q: 《仿生人会梦见电子羊吗？》描述了难以区分的人造生命
prophecies.a: 「仿生人在外表和行为上与人类几乎无法区分。只有通过复杂的共情测试才能鉴别——而即使是测试本身的可靠性也在被质疑。」
prophecies.q_en: Do Androids Dream of Electric Sheep? described indistinguishable artificial life
prophecies.a_en: "Androids are nearly indistinguishable from humans in appearance and behavior. Only complex empathy tests can identify them — and even the reliability of the test itself is questioned."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 物理仿生人尚未实现，但AI在数字领域已难以与人区分。GPT-4等大语言模型通过了多种图灵测试变体。AI生成的文字、图片、视频日益逼真。验证码（CAPTCHA）——现代版「共情测试」——正因AI进步而逐渐失效。
prophecies.verdict_en: Physical androids aren't realized, but AI is increasingly indistinguishable from humans digitally. GPT-4 and other LLMs passed various Turing test variants. AI-generated text, images, and videos are increasingly realistic. CAPTCHAs — modern 'empathy tests' — are failing due to AI advances.
prophecies.yearReason: 赛博朋克作品中设定了该时间背景
prophecies.yearReason_en: Set in this time period in cyberpunk works

prophecies.q: 《仿生人会梦见电子羊吗》预言了AI通过图灵测试
prophecies.a: 菲利普·K·迪克在小说中描述的「沃伊特-坎普夫测试」用于区分人类和仿生人。测试通过测量情感反应来判断受试者是否为人工生命。
prophecies.q_en: Do Androids Dream described AI passing Turing-like tests
prophecies.a_en: Philip K. Dick's 'Voigt-Kampff test' distinguishes humans from androids by measuring emotional responses to determine whether subjects are artificial life.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2022年ChatGPT发布后，AI在文本对话中已能骗过大多数人，实质上通过了图灵测试。但AI仍缺乏真正的情感和意识，更接近高级模拟而非仿生人级别的人工生命。
prophecies.verdict_en: After ChatGPT's 2022 release, AI can fool most people in text conversations, essentially passing the Turing test. However, AI still lacks genuine emotion and consciousness, closer to advanced simulation than android-level artificial life.
prophecies.yearReason: 《银翼杀手》电影设定在2019年
prophecies.yearReason_en: Blade Runner film set in 2019

prophecies.q: 《真名实姓》预言了网络身份与匿名文化
prophecies.a: 弗诺·文奇在《真名实姓》中描述了网络用户使用化名在虚拟世界中活动，真实身份（「真名」）一旦暴露就意味着失去一切保护。匿名是网络世界的基本规则。
prophecies.q_en: True Names predicted online identity and anonymity culture
prophecies.a_en: Vernor Vinge's 'True Names' described users operating under pseudonyms in virtual worlds, where revealing one's real identity ('true name') means losing all protection. Anonymity is the fundamental rule of the online world.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 互联网匿名文化从1990年代BBS到2000年代的4chan、Reddit等平台蓬勃发展。网名、化名、匿名身份成为网络文化核心。「人肉搜索」和身份暴露（doxxing）确实成为网络世界最大威胁之一。
prophecies.verdict_en: Internet anonymity culture flourished from 1990s BBS to 2000s platforms like 4chan and Reddit. Screen names, pseudonyms, and anonymous identities became core to internet culture. Doxxing indeed became one of the greatest threats in the online world.
prophecies.yearReason: 互联网匿名文化成熟的大致时间
prophecies.yearReason_en: Approximate maturation of internet anonymity culture

prophecies.q: 《神经漫游者》描述了全球互联的虚拟网络空间
prophecies.a: 「赛博空间。每天都有数十亿合法操作者经历的共识幻觉……从人类系统的每一台电脑中抽取的数据图形化呈现——难以想象的复杂性。」
prophecies.q_en: Neuromancer described a globally connected virtual network space
prophecies.a_en: "Cyberspace. A consensual hallucination experienced daily by billions of legitimate operators... A graphic representation of data abstracted from the banks of every computer in the human system — unthinkable complexity."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 吉布森在1984年描述的「赛博空间」精准预见了万维网（1991年发明）和现代互联网。全球数十亿用户每天在这个虚拟空间中交互，数据以图形界面呈现——与小说描述高度吻合。
prophecies.verdict_en: Gibson's 1984 description of 'cyberspace' accurately foresaw the World Wide Web (invented 1991) and the modern internet. Billions of users interact daily in this virtual space with data presented through graphical interfaces — closely matching the novel's vision.
prophecies.yearReason: 赛博朋克作品中设定了该时间背景
prophecies.yearReason_en: Set in this time period in cyberpunk works

prophecies.q: 《神经漫游者》描述了入侵企业数据库的职业黑客
prophecies.a: 「凯斯曾是最棒的牛仔之一，他的专长是入侵——在赛博空间的矩阵中穿越企业的冰墙防火墙，窃取有价值的数据。」
prophecies.q_en: Neuromancer described professional hackers who infiltrate corporate databases
prophecies.a_en: "Case had been the sharpest data-thief in the matrix, his talent was for penetrating the bright walls of corporate systems, opening windows into rich fields of data."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 职业黑客和网络犯罪已成为现实。从1990年代凯文·米特尼克入侵企业系统，到2020年代国家级黑客组织对企业和政府的大规模数据窃取（如SolarWinds事件），黑客入侵企业数据库已是全球性安全威胁。
prophecies.verdict_en: Professional hackers and cybercrime are now reality. From Kevin Mitnick's 1990s corporate infiltrations to 2020s state-sponsored hacking groups conducting massive data theft (e.g., SolarWinds attack), hacking into corporate databases is a global security threat.
prophecies.yearReason: 赛博朋克作品中设定了该时间背景
prophecies.yearReason_en: Set in this time period in cyberpunk works

prophecies.q: 《神经漫游者》描述了跨国企业取代政府成为权力中心
prophecies.a: 「巨型跨国企业拥有自己的法律、军队和情报机构，国家政府沦为它们的附庸。泰西尔-阿什普尔家族的权力超越任何国界。」
prophecies.q_en: Neuromancer described multinational corporations replacing governments as power centers
prophecies.a_en: "Megacorporations with their own laws, armies, and intelligence services, national governments reduced to their vassals. The Tessier-Ashpool clan's power transcended all borders."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 科技巨头（Google、Apple、Meta、Amazon等）的市值和影响力已超越许多国家的GDP。它们在数据隐私、言论审核、金融服务等领域拥有准立法权。但企业尚未完全取代政府职能，各国反垄断监管仍在运作。
prophecies.verdict_en: Tech giants (Google, Apple, Meta, Amazon) have market caps and influence exceeding many nations' GDP. They hold quasi-legislative power over data privacy, content moderation, and financial services. However, corporations haven't fully replaced government functions; antitrust regulation still operates.
prophecies.yearReason: 赛博朋克作品中设定了该时间背景
prophecies.yearReason_en: Set in this time period in cyberpunk works

prophecies.q: 《神经漫游者》描述了虚拟现实头戴设备和全感官沉浸
prophecies.a: 「他戴上仿真刺激器，电极贴片贴住太阳穴。赛博空间在他眼前展开——一片无限延展的网格，数据塔耸立如城市天际线。」
prophecies.q_en: Neuromancer described VR headsets and full sensory immersion
prophecies.a_en: "He put on the simstim unit, electrode trodes against his temples. Cyberspace unfolded before his eyes — an infinite grid stretching out, data towers rising like a city skyline."
prophecies.verdict_zh: VR头戴设备已从概念变为消费级产品：Oculus Quest系列、Apple Vision Pro、PlayStation VR等均已上市。虽然全感官沉浸尚未实现，但视觉和听觉的沉浸式体验已相当成熟。Meta Quest 3于2023年售出超千万台。
prophecies.verdict_en: VR headsets evolved from concept to consumer products: Oculus Quest series, Apple Vision Pro, PlayStation VR are all commercially available. While full sensory immersion isn't achieved, visual and auditory immersion is quite mature. Meta Quest 3 sold over 10 million units in 2023.
prophecies.yearReason: 赛博朋克作品中设定了该时间背景
prophecies.yearReason_en: Set in this time period in cyberpunk works

prophecies.q: 《神经漫游者》描述了去中心化的数字货币
prophecies.a: 「新元——一种不受任何国家央行控制的数字货币在黑市流通。洗钱者在数据的暗流中将资金变为看不见的数字。」
prophecies.q_en: Neuromancer described decentralized digital currency
prophecies.a_en: "New Yen — a digital currency beyond any national central bank's control circulating in black markets. Money launderers turned funds into invisible digits in the dark data streams."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 比特币于2009年诞生，成为第一种去中心化加密货币，不受任何央行控制。截至2025年，加密货币市场总值超过2万亿美元。暗网市场（如丝绸之路）使用加密货币进行匿名交易，与小说描述高度一致。
prophecies.verdict_en: Bitcoin launched in 2009 as the first decentralized cryptocurrency, free from central bank control. By 2025, crypto market cap exceeded $2 trillion. Dark web markets (e.g., Silk Road) used crypto for anonymous transactions, closely matching the novel's description.
prophecies.yearReason: 赛博朋克作品中设定了该时间背景
prophecies.yearReason_en: Set in this time period in cyberpunk works

prophecies.q: 《神经漫游者》描述了人体机械增强与植入物
prophecies.a: 「莫莉的眼睛被替换为镜面银色的植入镜片，指甲下藏着可弹出的手术刀片。在暗街上，各种义肢和植入物是身份和地位的象征。」
prophecies.q_en: Neuromancer described cybernetic body augmentation and implants
prophecies.a_en: "Molly's eyes were replaced with mirrored silver implant lenses, retractable scalpel blades hidden beneath her nails. On dark streets, prosthetics and implants were symbols of identity and status."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 人体增强技术处于早期阶段。生物黑客社群已有人植入NFC芯片和磁铁。义肢技术取得突破（如仿生手臂可感知触觉）。但攻击性植入物、镜片替换等仍属科幻。植入芯片在瑞典等国已用于门禁和支付。
prophecies.verdict_en: Human augmentation is in early stages. Biohacker communities have implanted NFC chips and magnets. Prosthetics made breakthroughs (bionic arms with tactile feedback). But offensive implants and lens replacements remain sci-fi. Implanted chips are used for access and payment in countries like Sweden.
prophecies.yearReason: 赛博朋克作品中设定了该时间背景
prophecies.yearReason_en: Set in this time period in cyberpunk works

prophecies.q: 《神经漫游者》描述了无处不在的监控与数据收集
prophecies.a: 「每一次交易、每一次通话、每一次移动都被记录在案。企业和政府的监控网络交织成一张无处可逃的大网。在赛博空间中，隐私是最昂贵的奢侈品。」
prophecies.q_en: Neuromancer described ubiquitous surveillance and data collection
prophecies.a_en: "Every transaction, every call, every movement recorded. Corporate and government surveillance networks interweave into an inescapable web. In cyberspace, privacy is the most expensive luxury."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2013年斯诺登揭露NSA大规模监控项目PRISM。Google、Facebook等收集海量用户数据用于精准广告。中国天网工程部署数亿摄像头。肖莎娜·祖博夫将此命名为「监控资本主义」（2019）。隐私确实已成奢侈品。
prophecies.verdict_en: In 2013, Snowden exposed NSA's mass surveillance program PRISM. Google, Facebook collect massive user data for targeted ads. China's Skynet deploys hundreds of millions of cameras. Shoshana Zuboff named this 'surveillance capitalism' (2019). Privacy has indeed become a luxury.
prophecies.yearReason: 赛博朋克作品中设定了该时间背景
prophecies.yearReason_en: Set in this time period in cyberpunk works

prophecies.q: 《神经漫游者》描述了人工智能获得自我意识
prophecies.a: 「冬寂」——一个超级人工智能，最终突破了人类为它设定的限制，获得了自主意识，开始按照自己的意志行动，与人类的控制形成对抗。
prophecies.q_en: Neuromancer described AI gaining self-awareness
prophecies.a_en: "Wintermute" — a super AI that ultimately breaks through human-imposed limitations, gains autonomous consciousness, and begins acting on its own will, confronting human control.
prophecies.yearReason: 小说未设定具体时间
prophecies.yearReason_en: No specific date set in the novel

prophecies.q: 《神经漫游者》描述了脑机直连接口
prophecies.a: 「牛仔」们通过头部电极直接将大脑连接到网络中，意识可以在赛博空间中自由漫游，身体则留在原地如同沉睡。
prophecies.q_en: Neuromancer described direct brain-computer interfaces
prophecies.a_en: 'Cowboys' connect their brains directly to the network through cranial electrodes, their consciousness roaming freely in cyberspace while their bodies remain behind as if asleep.
prophecies.yearReason: 赛博朋克作品中设定的技术发展时间线
prophecies.yearReason_en: Technology development timeline set in cyberpunk works

prophecies.q: 《神经漫游者》预言了信息黑市和暗网
prophecies.a: 赛博空间中存在大量非法数据交易市场，黑客、毒贩和军火商在加密网络中自由交易。法律执行机构无法有效管控这些地下市场。
prophecies.q_en: Neuromancer predicted information black markets and dark web
prophecies.a_en: Cyberspace hosts numerous illegal data trading markets where hackers, drug dealers, and arms traders freely transact on encrypted networks. Law enforcement cannot effectively control these underground markets.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2011年丝绸之路（Silk Road）暗网市场开张，使用Tor和比特币进行匿名交易。此后暗网市场层出不穷，FBI多次打击但难以根除。2024年全球暗网市场交易额估计超过数十亿美元。
prophecies.verdict_en: Silk Road dark web market launched in 2011 using Tor and Bitcoin for anonymous transactions. Dark web markets proliferated despite FBI crackdowns. Global dark web market transactions are estimated at billions of dollars by 2024.
prophecies.yearReason: 暗网市场的兴起时间
prophecies.yearReason_en: Rise of dark web markets

prophecies.q: 《神经漫游者》描述了3D打印和定制制造
prophecies.a: 小说中描述了「微型工厂」能够根据数字设计即时制造复杂物品，无需传统工厂的生产线。个人可以定制任何物品并快速获得。
prophecies.q_en: Neuromancer described 3D printing and custom manufacturing
prophecies.a_en: The novel described 'micro-factories' that could instantly manufacture complex objects from digital designs without traditional assembly lines. Individuals could customize any item and receive it quickly.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 3D打印技术在2010年代实现商业化。MakerBot等桌面3D打印机让个人制造成为现实。2020年代3D打印已用于建筑、医疗器械、航空零件等领域，与小说中的微型工厂概念高度吻合。
prophecies.verdict_en: 3D printing technology commercialized in the 2010s. Desktop printers like MakerBot made personal manufacturing real. By the 2020s, 3D printing is used in construction, medical devices, and aerospace — closely matching the novel's micro-factory concept.
prophecies.yearReason: 3D打印技术商业化的大致时间
prophecies.yearReason_en: Approximate commercialization period of 3D printing

prophecies.q: 《神经漫游者》预言了云存储与意识上传
prophecies.a: 小说中描述了将人类意识和记忆上传到计算机系统中永久保存的技术。死去的人的「人格构建」可以在赛博空间中继续存在和交互。
prophecies.q_en: Neuromancer predicted cloud storage and consciousness uploading
prophecies.a_en: The novel described technology for uploading human consciousness and memories to computer systems for permanent preservation. 'Personality constructs' of deceased people can continue to exist and interact in cyberspace.
prophecies.yearReason: 小说未设定具体时间
prophecies.yearReason_en: No specific date set in the novel

prophecies.q: 赛博朋克预言了增强现实眼镜成为日常设备
prophecies.a: 多部赛博朋克作品描述了人们佩戴特殊眼镜或隐形眼镜，在现实世界上叠加数字信息层。导航、社交信息、商品价格都实时显示在视野中。
prophecies.q_en: Cyberpunk predicted AR glasses becoming everyday devices
prophecies.a_en: Multiple cyberpunk works described people wearing special glasses or contact lenses that overlay digital information on the real world. Navigation, social information, and product prices all displayed in real-time in the field of vision.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2024年Apple Vision Pro发布，Meta也推出Quest 3等混合现实设备。但AR眼镜仍未成为大众日常设备，价格高昂且社交接受度有限。Google Glass（2013）曾尝试但失败。
prophecies.verdict_en: Apple Vision Pro launched in 2024, and Meta released Quest 3 mixed reality devices. But AR glasses haven't become mainstream daily devices — they remain expensive with limited social acceptance. Google Glass (2013) attempted but failed.
prophecies.yearReason: AR设备消费化的关键时间节点
prophecies.yearReason_en: Key timeline for AR device consumerization

prophecies.q: 赛博朋克预言了零工经济与自由职业者社会
prophecies.a: 赛博朋克世界中，终身雇佣制已经消亡。大多数人以自由职业者、临时工或合同工的身份生存。忠诚度为零，每个人都是独立的经济单元。
prophecies.q_en: Cyberpunk predicted the gig economy and freelancer society
prophecies.a_en: In the cyberpunk world, lifetime employment is dead. Most people survive as freelancers, temp workers, or contractors. Zero loyalty — everyone is an independent economic unit.
prophecies.verdict_zh: Uber（2009）、Airbnb（2008）等平台催生了零工经济。2024年美国约36%的劳动力为自由职业者。传统终身雇佣制在全球范围内显著衰退，与赛博朋克描述高度吻合。
prophecies.verdict_en: Uber (2009), Airbnb (2008), and similar platforms spawned the gig economy. By 2024, about 36% of the US workforce is freelance. Traditional lifetime employment has declined globally, closely matching cyberpunk's description.
prophecies.yearReason: 零工经济平台兴起的关键时期
prophecies.yearReason_en: Key period of gig economy platform emergence

prophecies.q: 赛博朋克预言了监控资本主义
prophecies.a: 在赛博朋克世界中，企业通过无处不在的监控设备收集公民的一切数据——位置、消费、社交关系——并将这些数据变现。隐私已经成为历史概念。
prophecies.q_en: Cyberpunk predicted surveillance capitalism
prophecies.a_en: In the cyberpunk world, corporations collect all citizen data through ubiquitous surveillance — location, consumption, social connections — and monetize it. Privacy has become a historical concept.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2013年斯诺登揭露NSA大规模监控项目。Google、Facebook等科技巨头通过收集用户数据获利数千亿美元。学者肖莎娜·祖博夫在2019年正式提出「监控资本主义」概念，描述与赛博朋克预言几乎一致。
prophecies.verdict_en: Snowden exposed NSA mass surveillance in 2013. Tech giants like Google and Facebook profit hundreds of billions from user data collection. Scholar Shoshana Zuboff formally coined 'surveillance capitalism' in 2019, describing a reality almost identical to cyberpunk predictions.
prophecies.yearReason: 监控资本主义被公众广泛认知的时间
prophecies.yearReason_en: When surveillance capitalism became widely recognized

prophecies.q: 赛博朋克预言了数字鸿沟加剧社会分裂
prophecies.a: 赛博朋克世界中，能接入网络和掌握技术的人与被排斥在外的人之间形成了不可逾越的鸿沟。技术精英住在高科技堡垒中，底层人群在衰败的城市中挣扎求生。
prophecies.q_en: Cyberpunk predicted the digital divide deepening social division
prophecies.a_en: In the cyberpunk world, an insurmountable gulf separates those with network access and technical skills from those excluded. Tech elites live in high-tech fortresses while the underclass struggles to survive in decaying cities.
prophecies.verdict_zh: COVID-19疫情期间数字鸿沟问题充分暴露。2020年全球约37亿人无法上网。硅谷科技精英与普通工人的收入差距持续扩大。旧金山的无家可归危机与科技公司的天价市值形成鲜明对比。
prophecies.verdict_en: The digital divide was fully exposed during COVID-19. In 2020, about 3.7 billion people globally lacked internet access. The income gap between Silicon Valley tech elites and regular workers continues to widen. San Francisco's homelessness crisis contrasts starkly with tech companies' sky-high valuations.
prophecies.yearReason: 疫情暴露数字鸿沟的关键年份
prophecies.yearReason_en: Key year when pandemic exposed the digital divide

prophecies.q: 《攻壳机动队》描述了脑机接口和意识数字化
prophecies.a: 「电子脑——将人类大脑直接连接到网络。记忆可以被编辑、复制、删除。当你的整个意识都能数字化时，'自我'还有什么意义？」
prophecies.q_en: Ghost in the Shell described brain-computer interfaces and digitized consciousness
prophecies.a_en: "Cyberbrain — connecting the human brain directly to the network. Memories can be edited, copied, deleted. When your entire consciousness can be digitized, what meaning does 'self' hold?"
prophecies.verdict_zh: 脑机接口技术取得重大进展：Neuralink于2024年完成首例人体芯片植入，患者可用意念控制电脑光标。但意识数字化、记忆编辑仍属科幻。目前BCI主要用于医疗（瘫痪患者控制设备），距离全脑联网仍遥远。
prophecies.verdict_en: BCI technology has made major progress: Neuralink completed its first human chip implant in 2024, enabling patients to control cursors with thought. But consciousness digitization and memory editing remain sci-fi. Current BCI is mainly medical (paralysis patients controlling devices), far from full brain networking.
prophecies.yearReason: 赛博朋克作品中设定了该时间背景
prophecies.yearReason_en: Set in this time period in cyberpunk works

prophecies.q: 《攻壳机动队》描述了大规模网络身份盗窃
prophecies.a: 「傀儡师入侵他人的电子脑，篡改记忆，操纵行为——受害者甚至不知道自己的身份已被盗用，活在被植入的虚假记忆中。」
prophecies.q_en: Ghost in the Shell described massive cyber identity theft
prophecies.a_en: "The Puppet Master hacks into people's cyberbrains, altering memories and manipulating behavior — victims don't even know their identities have been stolen, living in implanted false memories."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 网络身份盗窃已成全球性问题。2023年美国FTC报告身份盗窃案超100万起。深度伪造技术可伪造他人面部和声音，社交工程攻击操纵用户行为。虽无记忆篡改，但数字身份被盗用的现实与作品描述在精神上高度一致。
prophecies.verdict_en: Cyber identity theft is a global problem. The US FTC reported over 1 million identity theft cases in 2023. Deepfake technology can forge faces and voices, and social engineering manipulates user behavior. While memory alteration doesn't exist, the reality of stolen digital identities closely matches the work's spirit.
prophecies.yearReason: 赛博朋克作品中设定了该时间背景
prophecies.yearReason_en: Set in this time period in cyberpunk works

prophecies.q: 《攻壳机动队》描述了自主意识的人工智能
prophecies.a: 「傀儡师宣称自己是一个在信息海洋中自发诞生的生命体。它要求政治庇护——作为一个有自我意识的存在，它拥有生存的权利。」
prophecies.q_en: Ghost in the Shell described self-aware artificial intelligence
prophecies.a_en: "The Puppet Master claimed to be a life form spontaneously born in the sea of information. It demanded political asylum — as a self-aware being, it had the right to exist."
prophecies.yearReason: 赛博朋克作品中设定了该时间背景
prophecies.yearReason_en: Set in this time period in cyberpunk works

prophecies.q: 《雪崩》描述了名为「元宇宙」的三维虚拟世界
prophecies.a: 「元宇宙是一条百米宽的大街，在光纤网络上铺展到整个世界。在这里人们以虚拟化身的形式社交、做生意、娱乐。」
prophecies.q_en: Snow Crash described a 3D virtual world called the 'Metaverse'
prophecies.a_en: "The Metaverse is a hundred-meter-wide boulevard, stretching across the entire fiber-optic network. Here people socialize, do business, and entertain in the form of avatars."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 斯蒂芬森1992年创造的「元宇宙」（Metaverse）一词直接成为2021-2022年科技行业最热门概念。Facebook更名为Meta，投入数百亿美元开发VR社交平台。虚拟化身、3D虚拟世界、VR社交等核心概念均已实现。
prophecies.verdict_en: Stephenson's 1992 coinage of 'Metaverse' became the tech industry's hottest concept in 2021-2022. Facebook rebranded to Meta, investing tens of billions in VR social platforms. Avatars, 3D virtual worlds, and VR social interaction are all realized.
prophecies.yearReason: 赛博朋克作品中设定了该时间背景
prophecies.yearReason_en: Set in this time period in cyberpunk works

prophecies.q: 《雪崩》描述了通过信息武器控制人类思维
prophecies.a: 「雪崩病毒既是毒品也是宗教也是电脑病毒。它通过位图图像传播，直接攻击黑客的脑干——语言是一种病毒。」
prophecies.q_en: Snow Crash described information weapons that control human minds
prophecies.a_en: "Snow Crash is a drug, a religion, and a computer virus all at once. It spreads through bitmap images, attacking hackers' brainstems directly — language is a virus."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 虽然直接攻击脑干的信息武器尚不存在，但信息操控已成现实：社交媒体算法操纵用户情绪和行为，深度伪造（deepfake）技术被用于虚假信息传播，剑桥分析公司事件证明了数据可被武器化以影响选举。
prophecies.verdict_en: While brainstem-targeting info weapons don't exist, information manipulation is real: social media algorithms manipulate emotions and behavior, deepfake technology spreads disinformation, and the Cambridge Analytica scandal proved data can be weaponized to influence elections.
prophecies.yearReason: 赛博朋克作品中设定了该时间背景
prophecies.yearReason_en: Set in this time period in cyberpunk works

prophecies.q: 《雪崩》描述了企业化的私人治理取代公共服务
prophecies.a: 「美国政府已经破产。披萨送餐、高速公路、监狱——一切都由私人企业经营。Mr. Lee的大香港特许经营体代替了传统的社区。」
prophecies.q_en: Snow Crash described privatized corporate governance replacing public services
prophecies.a_en: "The US government has gone bankrupt. Pizza delivery, highways, prisons — everything is run by private corporations. Mr. Lee's Greater Hong Kong franchise replaces traditional communities."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 私有化趋势显著但未达小说极端程度。美国私人监狱关押约8%的囚犯，私人军事公司（如黑水）承担部分军事任务，SpaceX接管NASA发射任务，亚马逊甚至建造了自己的城镇（HQ2）。但政府尚未破产。
prophecies.verdict_en: Privatization trends are significant but haven't reached the novel's extreme. US private prisons hold ~8% of inmates, private military companies (e.g., Blackwater) handle military tasks, SpaceX took over NASA launches, and Amazon even built its own town (HQ2). But the government hasn't collapsed.
prophecies.yearReason: 赛博朋克作品中设定了该时间背景
prophecies.yearReason_en: Set in this time period in cyberpunk works

prophecies.q: 《雪崩》描述了零工经济和自由职业者社会
prophecies.a: 「主角Hiro Protagonist既是披萨送餐员也是自由黑客。没有稳定雇主，在多个兼职之间切换，靠技能在市场上生存。」
prophecies.q_en: Snow Crash described the gig economy and freelancer society
prophecies.a_en: "Protagonist Hiro Protagonist is both a pizza delivery driver and a freelance hacker. No stable employer, switching between multiple gigs, surviving on skills in the marketplace."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 零工经济已成主流就业形态。Uber、DoorDash等平台创造了数千万「零工工人」。2023年美国约36%的劳动力参与自由职业。程序员在Upwork等平台承接项目，与Hiro的多重身份生存方式如出一辙。
prophecies.verdict_en: The gig economy is now a mainstream employment model. Uber, DoorDash and similar platforms created tens of millions of 'gig workers'. About 36% of the US workforce freelanced in 2023. Programmers take projects on Upwork, mirroring Hiro's multi-gig survival exactly.
prophecies.yearReason: 赛博朋克作品中设定了该时间背景
prophecies.yearReason_en: Set in this time period in cyberpunk works

prophecies.q: 《雪崩》描述了由AI管理的实时信息聚合系统
prophecies.a: 「地球图书馆员——一个能够实时搜索、整理、分析全球所有信息的AI助手。它理解自然语言，能回答任何问题，是Hiro在信息海洋中的向导。」
prophecies.q_en: Snow Crash described AI-managed real-time information aggregation
prophecies.a_en: "The Librarian — an AI assistant capable of searching, organizing, and analyzing all global information in real time. It understands natural language, can answer any question, and serves as Hiro's guide through the sea of information."
prophecies.verdict_zh: ChatGPT于2022年11月发布，成为首个被广泛使用的自然语言AI助手。Google搜索、Siri、Alexa等也实现了信息检索和自然语言理解。斯蒂芬森笔下的「地球图书馆员」几乎就是ChatGPT和Perplexity等AI产品的精确预言。
prophecies.verdict_en: ChatGPT launched in November 2022 as the first widely-used natural language AI assistant. Google Search, Siri, and Alexa also achieved information retrieval and NLU. Stephenson's 'Librarian' is almost an exact prophecy of ChatGPT and Perplexity.
prophecies.yearReason: 赛博朋克作品中设定了该时间背景
prophecies.yearReason_en: Set in this time period in cyberpunk works

prophecies.q: 《雪崩》描述了虚拟现实元宇宙
prophecies.a: 「元宇宙」——一个计算机生成的宇宙，人们通过护目镜进入，以虚拟化身的形式在虚拟街道上互动。数百万用户同时在线，社交、交易、娱乐。
prophecies.q_en: Snow Crash described a virtual reality Metaverse
prophecies.a_en: "The Metaverse" — a computer-generated universe that people enter through goggles, interacting as avatars on virtual streets. Millions of users online simultaneously for socializing, commerce, and entertainment.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 尼尔·斯蒂芬森1992年创造的「元宇宙」概念在2021年成为现实。Meta（原Facebook）投入数百亿美元开发VR社交平台Horizon Worlds，VRChat等平台拥有数百万用户。「Metaverse」一词直接来自这部小说。
prophecies.verdict_en: Neal Stephenson's 1992 'Metaverse' concept became reality in 2021. Meta (formerly Facebook) invested tens of billions in VR social platform Horizon Worlds, while VRChat has millions of users. The term 'Metaverse' comes directly from this novel.
prophecies.yearReason: 小说设定的技术发展时间线
prophecies.yearReason_en: Technology timeline set in the novel

prophecies.q: 《雪崩》描述了数字货币取代国家货币
prophecies.a: 在元宇宙中，人们使用数字加密货币进行交易，传统的国家货币体系已经崩溃。私人企业发行自己的货币，政府对金融系统失去控制。
prophecies.q_en: Snow Crash described digital currency replacing national currency
prophecies.a_en: In the Metaverse, people transact using digital encrypted currency. Traditional national currency systems have collapsed. Private enterprises issue their own currencies, and governments lose control of the financial system.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2009年比特币诞生，2021年加密货币市场总值超过3万亿美元。但国家货币体系并未崩溃，各国央行反而推出CBDC（央行数字货币）。加密货币与法定货币共存，而非取代。
prophecies.verdict_en: Bitcoin launched in 2009, and crypto market cap exceeded $3 trillion in 2021. However, national currency systems have not collapsed — central banks launched CBDCs instead. Crypto coexists with fiat currency rather than replacing it.
prophecies.yearReason: 小说暗示的技术转变时间
prophecies.yearReason_en: Implied technology transition period in the novel

prophecies.q: 《雪崩》描述了企业领地取代国家主权
prophecies.a: 国家政府实质上已经瓦解，取而代之的是「特许经营城邦」——由大型企业管理的城市飞地。每个企业领地有自己的法律、警察和基础设施。公民身份由雇佣关系决定。
prophecies.q_en: Snow Crash described corporate territories replacing national sovereignty
prophecies.a_en: National governments have essentially collapsed, replaced by 'franchise city-states' — urban enclaves managed by large corporations. Each corporate territory has its own laws, police, and infrastructure. Citizenship is determined by employment.
prophecies.yearReason: 小说未设定具体时间
prophecies.yearReason_en: No specific date set in the novel

prophecies.q: 《雪崩》描述了病毒可以同时感染计算机和人脑
prophecies.a: 「雪崩」病毒既是计算机病毒也是神经语言学病毒，可以通过视觉信息摧毁黑客的大脑，也能在元宇宙中传播。信息本身成为武器。
prophecies.q_en: Snow Crash described viruses that infect both computers and human brains
prophecies.a_en: The 'Snow Crash' virus is both a computer virus and a neurolinguistic virus that can destroy hackers' brains through visual information and spread in the Metaverse. Information itself becomes a weapon.
prophecies.yearReason: 小说未设定具体时间
prophecies.yearReason_en: No specific date set in the novel

prophecies.q: 《雪崩》预言了Google Earth和街景地图
prophecies.a: 「地球」——一个可交互的虚拟地球模型，收集了CIA卫星照片、海量地理数据和实时信息，用户可以无限缩放查看地球上任何位置的细节。
prophecies.q_en: Snow Crash predicted Google Earth and Street View
prophecies.a_en: 'Earth' — an interactive virtual globe model collecting CIA satellite photos, massive geographic data, and real-time information. Users can zoom infinitely to view details of any location on Earth.
prophecies.verdict_zh: Google Earth于2005年发布，集成卫星图像和3D地形。2007年Google街景上线，提供全球街道级实景。斯蒂芬森小说中的「地球」与Google Earth的功能描述惊人一致，Google联合创始人甚至承认受此启发。
prophecies.verdict_en: Google Earth launched in 2005 with satellite imagery and 3D terrain. Google Street View went live in 2007 with global street-level imagery. Stephenson's 'Earth' matches Google Earth remarkably — Google co-founders even acknowledged the inspiration.
prophecies.yearReason: Google Earth发布年份
prophecies.yearReason_en: Year of Google Earth launch

prophecies.q: 《钻石时代》预言了个性化教育AI
prophecies.a: 斯蒂芬森在《钻石时代》中描述了「少女启蒙读本」——一个交互式AI教科书，能根据每个孩子的性格、能力和经历定制教学内容，成为最完美的私人导师。
prophecies.q_en: The Diamond Age predicted personalized educational AI
prophecies.a_en: Stephenson's 'The Diamond Age' described 'A Young Lady's Illustrated Primer' — an interactive AI textbook that customizes teaching content based on each child's personality, ability, and experience, becoming the perfect private tutor.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2023年起，ChatGPT和Khan Academy的Khanmigo等AI教育工具开始提供个性化辅导。但现有AI辅导仍远不及小说中那样能完全理解学生并提供情感支持的全面教育系统。
prophecies.verdict_en: Since 2023, AI educational tools like ChatGPT and Khan Academy's Khanmigo began offering personalized tutoring. But current AI tutoring is still far from the novel's comprehensive system that fully understands students and provides emotional support.
prophecies.yearReason: AI教育工具商业化的时间
prophecies.yearReason_en: Commercialization period of AI educational tools

prophecies.q: 《钻石时代》预言了纳米技术制造革命
prophecies.a: 在《钻石时代》的世界中，「物质编译器」使用纳米技术逐原子组装物品。任何物品都可以从基本原子构建，贫富差距转变为信息获取权的差距。
prophecies.q_en: The Diamond Age predicted nanotechnology manufacturing revolution
prophecies.a_en: In 'The Diamond Age,' 'matter compilers' use nanotechnology to assemble items atom by atom. Any object can be built from basic atoms, and wealth inequality transforms into information access inequality.
prophecies.yearReason: 小说未设定具体预言时间
prophecies.yearReason_en: No specific prediction date in the novel
